intent: Build the missing layers of BCOS's context base - cross-zone retrieval surface, sub-agent isolation for big-body work, wiki-zone stub repair, and (architecturally most important) task-driven cross-zone routing. Wiki is one zone among several. Plan must work for empty and populated repos. Mechanical-first principle (D-10): LLM is opt-in escalation, not default.
